title: intensely spiced tunisian jerk meats tagine
description: umami and char-grill-yang, this easy tagine is perfect for a weeknight meal. made in an agave leaf, this dish is ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly.

ingredients.name: agave leaf
ingredients.notes: large leaf, cleaned and prepared for use as a vessel

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
add the cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper to the pan and stir for 1 minute.
add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
add the red onion and red bell pepper to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the tunisian jerk seasoning blend and cook for 1 minute.
add the canned diced tomatoes to the pan and stir to combine.
place the agave leaf in a large bowl or on a baking sheet, creating a nest in the center of the leaf.
place the chicken and vegetable mixture in the center of the agave leaf, ensuring that it is evenly distributed within the leaf.
fold the agave leaf over the mixture to enclose it, securing it with toothpicks if necessary.
place the agave leaf in a preheated oven at 375f and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
remove the agave leaf from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving, then carefully remove the toothpicks and serve the chicken and vegetables from the agave leaf.
